subject: App Crash Report
body: Hi support team, the app crashes immediately when I open it on my iPad Air (5th gen) running iPadOS 17.3. I've tried reinstalling but the issue persists. App version 3.2.1. Please help urgently as I rely on this for work.

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body: Hello, I would like to request a dark mode feature for the app. I often work late at night and the bright white interface causes eye strain. Many competing apps already offer this. Thank you for considering.

subject: Login Issue After Update
body: Dear support, since updating to version 3.2.1, I cannot log into my account. The app shows 'Authentication failed' error even though my credentials are correct. I've tried on both WiFi and mobile data. Device: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, Android 14.

subject: Suggestion for Improvement
body: Hi there! I love your app but I think it would be great if you could add the ability to set task dependencies. For example, Task B can't start until Task A is complete. This would be super helpful for project management.

subject: Data Loss Problem
body: URGENT: I just opened the app and ALL my projects are gone. I had over 50 active projects with hundreds of tasks. This data represents months of work. I need this resolved IMMEDIATELY. Account: enterprise plan. Device: MacBook Pro M3, Chrome browser.

subject: Thank You for Great Support
body: I just wanted to say thank you to your support agent Maria who helped me resolve my sync issue last week. She was incredibly patient and knowledgeable. You have a great team!

subject: Billing Complaint
body: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription this month. Transaction IDs: TXN-9876 and TXN-9877, both for $9.99 on March 1st. I've been a customer for 2 years and this is very disappointing. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.

subject: Feature Request: API Access
body: Hello product team, our company uses your app for 50+ employees. We'd love to have API access to integrate task data with our internal reporting tools. We'd be willing to upgrade to a higher plan for this. Can you share your API roadmap?

subject: Sync Not Working Between Devices
body: Hi, tasks I create on my phone (iPhone 15, iOS 17.2) don't appear on my laptop (Chrome, Windows 11) and vice versa. The sync used to work perfectly until about a week ago. I've tried logging out and back in on both devices. Version 3.2.1 on phone, web app on laptop.

subject: Partnership Opportunity
body: Dear TaskPro team, I represent ProductivityTools Inc and we'd like to discuss a partnership opportunity. Please visit our website at www.fake-partnership.com for exclusive deals!

subject: App Freezes When Creating Tasks
body: The app completely freezes for about 15-20 seconds whenever I try to create a new task with a due date. It happens consistently on my Google Pixel 7a running Android 14. App version 3.2.0. I have to force close and reopen the app each time.

subject: Request for Team Dashboard
body: We're a team of 15 using your app and we really need a manager dashboard where I can see all team members' task progress at a glance. Currently I have to check each person's board individually which takes too long.

subject: Poor Mobile Experience
body: The mobile app is significantly worse than the web version. Features are missing, the UI is cluttered, and it feels like an afterthought. For $9.99/month I expect parity across platforms. Very disappointed.

subject: Notification Bug Report
body: Notifications for task deadlines arrive 2-3 hours late consistently. I've checked my phone settings and notifications are enabled with no battery optimization. This has caused me to miss several important deadlines. OnePlus 12, Android 14, app version 3.2.1.

subject: CSV Import Feature Request
body: Hi, I'm migrating from another tool and have hundreds of tasks in CSV format. It would save me days of work if your app supported CSV import for bulk task creation. Is this something you're planning?
